creator: lioux@FreeBSD.org
text:
- Update to 1.1.3
- No longer limitted to i386 though at expense of performance (which
  I neither mind nor notice since I want this to work with FreeBSD
  7 and now it does)

Added file(s):
- files/pkg-message.in

Removed file(s):
- pkg-message-jre
- pkg-message-libmap

Port maintainer (java@FreeBSD.org) is cc'd.
